3327400.name: The Shattered Veil
3327400.description:
PRESENTATION

This is a 2D old-school RPG in the style of Skyfall, Sandfall and Moonfall.

Kael and Elara Briarstone are the last survivors of their family. Although their parents, the King and Queen, triumphed in the war against the Wraith Army, they paid for that victory with their lives.

The Wraith Army rises again, slowly but surely, and it falls to Kael to wear the Crown and lead his people to victory once more. After spending the last decade preparing for Coronation Day with the help of his sister, Elara, they will soon discover that the Wraith Army is much closer than they had anticipated.

FEATURES

  • 15 hours of playtime

  • Classic and engaging gameplay

  • Touching and exciting storyline

  • Varied locations to explore

  • Mouse Support
